content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति वचनम् हृष्टः निशाम्य च।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti vacanam hṛṣṭaḥ niśāmya ca
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the profound words of counsel, with a joyful heart, after observing all the auspicious signs around him. This brought peace to everyone who was present there. May his radiant joy inspire deep calm in our hearts as well.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति वनम् क्रोधतः महासत्त्वः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti vanam krodhataḥ mahāsattvaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the sprawling and sacred forest, with righteous indignation, showcasing his immense strength and unyielding spirit. He remained fully committed to upholding cosmic order at all costs. This noble act restored balance and courage throughout the realm.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति राक्षसम् शोकार्तः अरिमर्दनः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti rākṣasam śokārtaḥ arimardanaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the fierce demon threat, though deeply afflicted by grief, standing as the ultimate subduer of all negative forces. He demonstrated that duty and righteousness always transcend personal sorrow. His calm resilience serves as a eternal beacon of hope.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति लङ्काम् पुनः प्लवङ्गमः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti laṅkām punaḥ plavaṅgamaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the golden city of Lanka, once again, in the loyal presence of the devoted monkey guides. Together, they prepared to face the upcoming spiritual and physical challenges. This beautiful union represents the power of collaborative faith and devotion.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति अयोध्याम् तदा नराधिपः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti ayodhyām tadā narādhipaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near his beloved kingdom of Ayodhya, at that auspicious time, acting as the rightful sovereign and leader of men. He ruled not with authority, but with deep love and compassionate care for his subjects. His gentle presence brought prosperity and safety to all.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति सागरम् शीघ्रम् रघूत्तमः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti sāgaram śīghram raghūttamaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the vast and roaring ocean, with great swiftness, acting as the most distinguished descendant of the Raghu dynasty. He moved with grace and a clear sense of divine purpose. This swift action removed all obstacles and brought immediate relief to the distressed.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति पर्वतम् सर्वदा कपिञ्जरः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti parvatam sarvadā kapiñjaraḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the majestic mountain peak, in the constant and faithful company of the noble monkey chief Kapinjara. Their enduring friendship exemplified the power of loyalty, trust, and shared spiritual goals. Together they marched forward to execute the divine mission.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति रामम् सत्येन राक्षसेश्वरः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti rāmam satyena rākṣaseśvaraḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near his own inner divine path and duty, with absolute truthfulness, while even the formidable king of the demons stood observing in silent awe. His uncompromising commitment to truth disarmed all deceit and hostility. Truth indeed remains the ultimate shield in the three worlds.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति सीताम् धर्मेण महानुभावः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti sītām dharmeṇa mahānubhāvaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near his beloved and virtuous consort Sita, in perfect accordance with the laws of dharma, behaving as a high-souled and noble being. His every gesture breathed spiritual wisdom and moral integrity. He showed the entire world how to live a life of selfless duty.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति रावणम् भक्त्या वानरर्षभः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti rāvaṇam bhaktyā vānaraṛṣabhaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the formidable demon king Ravana, with deep devotion, while the heroic chief of the monkeys stood by with folded hands. This sacred bond of love and service became the foundation of their ultimate victory. It reminds us of the power of complete surrender to the divine.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति वानरान् वेगेन नरोत्तमः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti vānarān vegena narottamaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the devoted host of vanaras (monkeys), with swift and powerful momentum, acting as the best and most refined among human beings. He showed unmatched skill and composure under pressure. His resolute action inspired the entire host to follow the path of courage.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति धनुः अतीव राजीवलोचनः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti dhanuḥ atīva rājīvalocanaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the heavy, celestial bow, exceedingly well, appearing as the lotus-eyed Lord of the universe. His merciful glance brought immense comfort to all who looked upon his beautiful form. That divine vision removed all sorrow and doubts in an instant.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति बाणम् मुदा लक्ष्मणपूर्वजः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti bāṇam mudā lakṣmaṇapūrvajaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the swift and infallible arrow, with immense joy, acting as the beloved elder brother of Lakshmana. The deep fraternal love they shared was a beautiful testament to familial virtue and harmony. Their mutual trust remains a guiding light for household relationships.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति रथम् हर्षात् राक्षसान्तकः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti ratham harṣāt rākṣasāntakaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the glorious golden chariot, with profound joy, manifesting as the destroyer of all negative and demonic forces. He dispelled the darkness of fear and brought absolute freedom to the sages. His victory is a promise of protection to all who seek shelter.

content.sanskrit: धर्मात्मा रामो करोति सैन्यम् भयात् नृपात्मजः।
content.transliteration: dharmātmā rāmo karoti sainyam bhayāt nṛpātmajaḥ
content.text: The righteous Lord Rama performed his sacred duties near the brave and loyal army, reassuringly to dispel all fear, behaving as the noble prince of Ayodhya. He stood as a towering shield of safety for his people, driving away all anxieties. His presence filled the entire assembly with confidence and peace.
